text.title: Gcp Networking Vpc Procedure
text.summary: Step-by-step procedure to apply the gcp-networking-vpc methodology end-to-end. Each step lists explicit input → action → output and (optionally) a decision-gate.

step.name: design-vpc
step.action: Custom VPC, per-region subnets, IP plan.

step.name: gke-secondaries
step.action: Pre-create secondary ranges if GKE will be hosted here.

step.name: firewall-strategy
step.action: SA-based firewall rules; hierarchical policies at folder/org.

step.name: observability
step.action: Enable Flow Logs (+ Packet Mirroring for sensitive subnets).
